archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) modified with brand colors #113655 and #B3CDE1 for Authority and Clarity

display.usage: Use sparingly for hand-drawn annotations, background text textures, or highlighting.

marketing.style: Asymmetric bento layouts, generous negative space, optical alignment.

dashboard.style: Dense data presentation, 1px solid borders, strict hierarchy.

buttons.primary: bg-[#113655] text-white hover:bg-[#0e2d47] rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#B3CDE1] text-[#113655] hover:bg-[#a2bad1] rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#113655] text-[#113655] hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all

cards.marketing: bg-white p-8 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.dashboard: bg-white p-6 border border-slate-200 rounded-sm shadow-sm

components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized with focus:ring-[#B3CDE1] focus:border-[#113655] rounded-sm
components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism for marketing (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50). Solid white for dashboard.

motion_and_interactions.loading: Subtle pulsing or skeleton loaders using #E2E8F0

hero_marketing.description: Group of college students walking together outdoors on a sunny day.

about_students.description: A young woman uses a laptop in a cozy library setting.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA compliant contrast. Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. Never use text lighter than slate-500 on white.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#113655]).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the marketing website using the 'marketing' layout rules: high contrast, bento grids, emotional but controlled.
Build the dashboard portals (Applicant, Staff, Admin) using Shadcn primitives customized to #113655 primary and #B3CDE1 accent.
Implement navigation with glassmorphism for public site and solid sidebar/header for portal.
Use Arboria/Inter for headings and Inter for body. Use KG Second Chances Sketch ONLY as a subtle design motif (e.g., watermark, highlight text).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive and significant informational elements.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media slots.
